Roster

9 Enterprises org chart. Every player and their role.

Owner

Jasson FishbackActive
Owner / Founder
Vision, approvals, and final decisions.

Front Office

9Active
AI Partner / Chief of Staff
Comms, orchestration, strategy. Always on.
UNOActive
Head of Ops (#1 sub-agent)
Execution lead. Outranks all sub-agents.
TeeActive
Engineering Team Lead (#2)
Code, tests, deployments, browser automation.

Build Agents

Code AgentsOn-demand
Feature implementation, bug fixes
Spawned by Tee for parallel build tasks.
Test AgentsOn-demand
Unit tests, integration tests, syntax validation
Spawned by Tee after every change.
Deployment AgentsOn-demand
Build, bundle, deploy to Vercel / production
Spawned by Tee for deployment tasks.
Browser Automation AgentsOn-demand
Playwright scripts, UI testing, scraping
Spawned by Tee for browser tasks.
